landing.hero_subtitle: Pre-harvest intelligence to grow more, and a post-harvest marketplace to earn more. Everything you need, exactly when you need it.
landing.problem_subtitle: Every planting season is a gamble. But it shouldn't be.
landing.footer_cta_subtitle: Join 50,000+ progressive Indian farmers transforming their yields with AgriPredict AI today.

success.subtitle: Every planting season, thousands of farmers use our AI engine to de-risk their investments. These are their stories of resilience and precision.
success.cta_subtitle: Start your first soil analysis today and join the community of farmers who farm with precision and profit.

market.input_desc: Direct acquisition of certified seeds and chemical-grade nutrients at institutional prices.
market.harvest_desc: Connect directly with industrial buyers and exporters. Eliminate middlemen with verified bidding.

chatbot.welcome: Hello! I am AgriPredict AI Assistant. How can I help you with your farm today?
